# Michelle Mayes — michellemayes.me

> Full-stack builder shipping AI-powered products, web apps, and practical developer tools.

## About

Michelle Mayes is a data scientist and AI product engineer who builds intelligent systems using RAG, LLMs, and modern web stacks. She has experience in data science, product management, and full-stack engineering, with a focus on practical AI applications that ship to production.

## Key Content

- Homepage: https://michellemayes.me/
- Blog: https://michellemayes.me/blog/
- Projects: https://michellemayes.me/projects/
- Resume: https://michellemayes.me/resume/
- About: https://michellemayes.me/about/

## Notable Work

- Built a RAG-powered AI agent that replaced the product management function, handling 264 sessions and saving ~400 engineering hours in its first month
- Created terrarium, a lightweight Mac app built with Tauri & Rust for viewing TSX/JSX components
- Built vibe-tooling, a Claude Code plugin marketplace for code quality tools
- Created heb-grocery-agent, a Chrome extension that automates grocery shopping on HEB.com

## Expertise Areas

- AI/ML systems: RAG pipelines, LLM integration, prompt engineering, embeddings
- Product management: Specification writing, PRDs, product strategy
- Full-stack development: Astro, Next.js, React, TypeScript, Python, Rust
- Data science: Analytics, machine learning, data pipelines
- Cloud infrastructure: AWS (Lambda, Step Functions, Bedrock, DynamoDB), Vercel
